summary: Parallel review: FAIL (3 critical, 3 warning, 11 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: 🔴 iteration-escalation — Persistent eval warning: fabricated-refs recurred in iterations 1, 2

🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:1352 — `commentIssue` is fire-and-forget with no try/catch; an API throw would skip the subsequent `markChecklistItemBlocked` + `harness("transition")` calls and lose the block transition. Wrap in try/catch + warn-log, plus a test injecting a throwing `commentIssue`.

🟡 test/review-escalation.test.mjs:243 — Acceptance test exercises `buildEscalationSummary` directly; a regression removing the `commentIssue(...)` line at run.mjs:1352 would still pass. Add a thin integration test that stubs `commentIssue` and asserts it's called with `(task.issueNumber, body)`.
No 🔴. PASS — yellow items are coverage gaps for adjacent failure modes, appropriate for backlog. Eval written to `.team/features/max-review-rounds-escalation/tasks/task-3/eval.md`.

No 🔴 or 🟡 findings. Shell-injection vector is closed via `spawnSync(gh, args, ...)` with array args. JSON parsing of round files is wrapped in try/catch. No secrets/credential handling. Gate `npm test` exit code 0 verified against artifact. Detailed eval written to `tasks/task-3/eval-security.md`.
